exec-model-ruleunit/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit JUnit 4 dependency, likely because it is now provided transitively or replaced by JUnit 5 in the parent POM.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a newer version compatible with Java 21.

exec-model-ruleunit/src/test/java/com/kc.general_idea: Migrate test class from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 annotations and assertions.
exec-model-ruleunit/src/test/java/com/kc.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, org.junit.Assert) are not part of JUnit 5; tests will fail to compile or run if JUnit 4 dependencies are removed or if the test runner expects JUnit 5 structure.

exec-model-ruleunit/src/test/java/com/kc.general_idea: Fix argument order for assertTrue to match JUnit 5 API signature.
exec-model-ruleunit/src/test/java/com/kc.why_exists: JUnit 5 Assertions.assertTrue(boolean, String) expects the boolean condition first and the message second; the old JUnit 4 order (String, boolean) causes a compile error.
